bits_probe.c.reason: Focused bit-operation probe retained for interactive investigation; no stable server oracle has been recorded.

gcvt_fast_scientific_probe.c.reason: Formatting regression probe needs a chat/storage oracle before it can be automated.

global_asm_macro_helper_probe.c.reason: Global-asm macro helper reproduction is retained outside the runtime suite pending a deterministic output contract.

libc_mcstr_quote_scratch_probe.c.reason: String scratch-space reproduction has no recorded post-run observable yet.

libmc_mcf_slot_probe.c.reason: Slot probe is retained for targeted libmc debugging; promote it when its storage oracle is documented.

macro_arg_mutation_probe.c.reason: Macro mutation reproduction requires a dedicated expected emitted-command contract.

macro_inline_storage_probe.c.reason: Inline storage macro reproduction is intentionally not run until its server-visible expectation is defined.

mcf_slot_matrix_repro.c.reason: Matrix reproduction is exploratory and lacks a single stable oracle.

mcstr_alloc_ids_repro.c.reason: Allocation-id reproduction needs an explicit storage expectation before automatic execution.

mcstr_multi_slot_write_repro.c.reason: Multi-slot write reproduction has not yet been converted into a deterministic runtime assertion.

struct_field_string_puts_repro.c.reason: Struct/string puts reproduction is retained for diagnosis pending a chat or storage oracle.
